General.Name: Beijing Jingkelong Co Ltd
General.Description: Beijing Jingkelong Company Limited engages in the retail and wholesale distribution of daily consumer products. It operates through three segments: Retailing, Wholesaling, and Others. The company is involved in the operation of hypermarkets, supermarkets, convenience stores, and department stores. It engages in the sale of food, non-staple food, daily necessities, tobacco and liquor, hardware and household appliances, and other commodities. The company also engages in the sale of plastic packaging products, hotel room services, school training services, and others. Beijing Jingkelong Company Limited was formerly known as Beijing Jingkelong Supermarket Chain Company Limited. The company was founded in 1994 and is based in Beijing, China.
